hero_sub: Marvello Mebel — where luxury, elegance and craftsmanship meet
prod_sub: Premium furniture curated from the finest collections
about_body: Founded in 2010, Marvello Mebel has established itself as a leader in premium furniture manufacturing in Uzbekistan. Every piece we create combines contemporary design with uncompromising quality.
about_body_full: Founded in 2010, Marvello Mebel has established itself as a leader in premium furniture manufacturing in Uzbekistan. Every piece we create combines contemporary design with uncompromising quality. We continuously strive to fill our customers' homes with luxury and comfort.
step1_d: Creating exclusive designs based on client requirements
step2_d: Selecting the finest materials imported from Turkey
step4_d: Free and careful delivery across Uzbekistan
testi1_text: I have never regretted purchasing Marvello furniture. The quality and design are outstanding!
testi2_text: We bought the RICH sofa — the quality exceeded all our expectations. Highly recommended!
testi3_text: The GALAXY bedroom set transformed our room entirely. Stunning craftsmanship and attention to detail!
svc1_d: We craft furniture in any size and color combination. Your vision — our mission.
svc2_d: Materials and finished furniture directly imported from Turkey's finest factories.
svc3_d: Free delivery across Uzbekistan. 1–2 days in Tashkent, 3–5 days to regions.
faq_questions: Can furniture be purchased on credit?
How long does it take to complete an order?
Do products come with a warranty?
Can furniture be ordered in custom sizes?
faq_answers: Yes, we partner with several banks and offer 0% installment financing.
Standard products are ready in 7–14 days; custom orders in 21–30 days.
Yes, we have a delivery service across Uzbekistan. Free within Tashkent.
All our products come with a 2-year manufacturer's warranty.
Yes, through our custom order service we can make furniture in any size and color.
footer_tagline: Premium furniture — luxury and quality in harmony.
v1d: Only the highest quality materials in every product
v2d: We build long-term trusting relationships with our clients
v3d: Blending Uzbek furniture traditions with contemporary design
v4d: We apply modern technologies and new design solutions
v5d: We serve our clients 7/24 even after the sale
quote_text: MARVELLO MEBEL — Heritage and quality guaranteed!
meta_home_desc: Marvello Mebel — Uzbekistan's premier furniture brand. Bedroom, living room and soft furniture. 50,000+ clients since 2010.
meta_catalog_desc: Marvello Mebel catalog: bedroom, living room and soft furniture collections. Premium quality, free delivery.
meta_about_desc: Learn more about Marvello Mebel, founded in 2010. Our values, team and mission.
meta_news_desc: Marvello Mebel news, furniture trends and interior design tips.
meta_contact_desc: Contact Marvello Mebel. Tashkent, Uzbekistan. Tel: +99899 856 05 55
